title: Shivam
subTitle: Shiva is a carefree lad who helps couples in love marry. Soon, he finds his own heart stolen, while being pursued by enemies determined to break them apart.

title: Friendship
subTitle: After getting involved in the murder of a man they hired to play a prank on their aunt, two friends attempt to clear their names.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Prem Deewane
subTitle: A young couple in love run away together after their parents oppose their relationship. They are misguided into kidnapping a wealthy person for a big ransom by a shrewd uncle who has his own agenda.

title: Muqadama
subTitle: Ajit returns home to see that his wife has killed herself after being raped by three men. He tries to avenge her but is caught by the police and sentenced to be hanged after he kills one culprit.

title: Khatta Meetha
subTitle: A seemingly corrupt petty contractor faces challenges from the local municipality, his family, his employees, as well as a former girlfriend and her family.

title: Ajay
subTitle: Manorama falls in love with Ajay, even though they come from different social backgrounds. They want to get married, but Manorama's uncles try their best to separate the happy couple.

title: Gadar: Ek Prem Katha
subTitle: A Sikh trucker and an aristocratic Muslim woman fall in love against the backdrop of the 1947 partition.

title: Military Raaj
subTitle: Major Anand is reassigned to a camp for unruly cadets but soon finds himself confronting deeper threats as lawlessness rises and the authorities struggle to maintain order.

title: Barood
subTitle: Jai, an honest police officer, falls in love with Neha, Mr Singhal's daughter. However, he suspects Mr Singhal to be a criminal and tries to catch him red-handed.

title: S 3
subTitle: A police officer is assigned to solve the murder of the police commissioner. However, when he stumbles across a criminal syndicate, he decides to put an end to their tyranny.

title: S 3
subTitle: A police officer is assigned to solve the murder of the police commissioner. However, when he stumbles across a criminal syndicate, he decides to put an end to their tyranny.

title: Double Gadbad
subTitle: A series of comical complexities ensue when two men who look alike find themselves in numerous problems, leading to utter confusion.

title: Khoon Ki Pyaasi
subTitle: Nisha loves Srinu. When she realises that Srinu is getting close to Moksha, she decides to harm Moksha with black magic. However, she is unaware of Moksha's true self.

title: Jai Mahashakti
subTitle: The king of Travancore is ruthless and tortures his subjects. However, Vaikundasamy, an incarnation of Lord Vishnu, decides to put an end to this tyranny.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Akbar Aur Birbal
subTitle: Akbar Aur Birbal

title: Chor Machaaye Shor
subTitle: A thief pretends to be a policeman to extract a stolen diamond from the police headquarters. Although he becomes the ACP's favourite, a suspicious colleague tries to corner him with hilarious results.

title: Krrish 3
subTitle: Krishna lives happily with his wife Priya and his father. However, their peaceful life is shattered when Kaal abducts Priya.

title: Maine Pyar Kiya
subTitle: Prem and Suman fall in love with each other, only to be torn apart by family differences. However, Suman's father is willing to give Prem one last chance where he must prove himself worthy of Suman.

title: Krishna
subTitle: The life of Sunil, an aspiring pilot, takes a disastrous turn when he is falsely convicted for a crime he did not commit.

title: Tirangaa
subTitle: Brigadier Suryadev Singh and Shivajirao Waghle, a police inspector, work together to track down a terrorist who plans to evade India.

title: Fauji
subTitle: A soldier and a villager-turned-dacoit gang up for an act of revenge against the atrocities of the local headman terrorising the hamlet of Madhopur.

title: Fauji
subTitle: A soldier and a villager-turned-dacoit gang up for an act of revenge against the atrocities of the local headman terrorising the hamlet of Madhopur.

title: Vardaan Devi Maa Ka
subTitle: Tarigonda Vengamamba, an 18th-century poetess, devotes her life serving Lord Venkateshwara. She starts writing numerous songs for him and also considers him as her husband.

title: Love U Ganesha
subTitle: Chintu always complains to Lord Ganesha about the hard work that he has to do as a fifth-grader. Lord Ganesha decides to help him in his own unique way.

title: Maa Ki Mamta
subTitle: Thakur Dharam seeks a nurse for his son after his wife passes away; the wife of one of his farm laborers agrees to help him.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Bal Hanuman
subTitle: A mischievous Hanuman grows up to become a heroic being who fights all evil creatures and helps Lord Rama in rescuing Sita from Lanka.

title: Phool Aur Kaante
subTitle: Love leads Ajay down a new path when he is expected to inherit his father's criminal empire, bringing along perils that could either tear their family apart or solidify their bond.

title: Supreme Khiladi
subTitle: A charitable trust faces threats from a powerful mafia leader who has set his eyes on its land. He plans to kill the legal heir to grab the wealth, but a brave taxi driver becomes an impediment.

title: Raja Ki Aayegi Baraat
subTitle: A woman's desperate plea for justice falls on deaf ears as she's forced against her will to marry the man who assaulted her.

title: Aaj Ka Arjun
subTitle: A ruthless landlord exiles Bheema due to his rebellion against him. However, when his nephew is abducted, Bheema sets out to gain the support of the villagers and rescue the boy.

title: Judaai
subTitle: Shashikant and Gauri get married in honour of his late father's will. But, marital problems soon arise when Gauri suspects him of having an affair, leading to a chain of misunderstandings.

title: Kurukshetra
subTitle: ACP Prithviraj, an honest man, arrests Chief Minister Baburao's son for raping a woman. Consequently, Baburao leaves no stone unturned to get revenge against Prithviraj.
